^=Blank (skip pattern)
560 V0100B_PRIOR_PPS_CD V0100B_PRIOR_PPS_CD V0100B Prior Assessment PPS Reason for Assessment Code CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the PPS Reason for Assessment of the most recent prior OBRA or Scheduled PPS assessment. 01=5-day scheduled assessment
02=14-day scheduled assessment
03=30-day scheduled assessment
04=60-day scheduled assessment
05=90-day scheduled assessment
06=Readmission/return assessment
07=Unscheduled assessment used for PPS
